summary: This document is a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) outlining the statistical methods and quality assurance protocols used by KeepMeCompany. It defines responsibilities for product teams, references regulatory standards like ISO 13485 and 21 CFR Part 820, and details procedures for sample size determination and data analysis. The SOP serves as a guideline for ensuring product reliability and process capability during development and manufacturing.
